name: large room
hints: A large room with clay pigeons. There are exits south and down.
The clay pigeons are targets for the shooting gallery. S leads to the hidden laboratory!
D leads to a long tunnel. S leads to the laboratory where the plans should be.
SHOO PIGE with the gun from the gallery to hit the clay pigeons. S=laboratory (room 6), D=tunnel (room 34).
notes: Large room with clay pigeons (shooting gallery targets). S=hidden laboratory (room 6 - the goal!), D=long tunnel (room 34).
